name: analyze_audio
description: Analyze audio content using Gemini. Can transcribe, describe sounds, identify music, etc. Returns task_id (async).

file_path.description: Path to the audio file to analyze

prompt.description: What to analyze (e.g. 'Transcribe this audio', 'What sounds are in this?')

returns: task_id (string) for async status tracking via get_task_status
notes: Async operation - use get_task_status to check progress.
